intro_cards.title: Resultant State: てある
intro_cards.body:
てある (te-form + ある) describes a state resulting from a deliberate action.

Pattern: [transitive verb te-form] + ある

• 窓が開けてある。(The window has been opened — and stays open.)
• 料理が作ってある。(The food has been made — and is ready.)
• 名前が書いてある。(A name is written there — someone wrote it.)

てある vs ている:
• ている — ongoing state or action (often intransitive)
• てある — intentional preparation by someone

窓が開いている (window is open — state)
窓が開けてある (window was opened — intentionally, by someone)
